name: js-arrays-master-14-projects
description: 15 Proyectos independientes para cada método de array + Decoder

scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:push" "npm run start:pop" "npm run start:unshift" "npm run start:shift" "npm run start:splice" "npm run start:slice" "npm run start:indexof" "npm run start:includes" "npm run start:foreach" "npm run start:map" "npm run start:filter" "npm run start:reduce" "npm run start:sort" "npm run start:reverse" "npm run start:decoder"
